briefdescription.para: Encode MQTT remaining length into variable-length bytes.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Socket sock, uint8_t *buf, size_t len, uint32_t timeout_ms)
memberdef.name: read_all

briefdescription.para: Read exactly len bytes from socket.

simplesect.para: Total bytes read, or -1 on error.

briefdescription.para: Read MQTT variable-length "remaining length" field from socket.
Build and send an MQTT CONNECT packet.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_MqttClient *c, const uint8_t *payload, uint32_t len, uint8_t qos_bits)
memberdef.name: handle_publish

parameterdescription.para: QoS flags from the fixed header.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_MqttClient *client, const char *host, uint16_t port, const char *client_id, const char *username, const char *password, uint16_t keep_alive_s, uint8_t *rx_buf, size_t rx_buf_size, uint8_t *tx_buf, size_t tx_buf_size)
memberdef.name: syn_mqtt_init

detaileddescription.para: Configures broker destination, client ID, authentication credentials, keep-alive timing parameters, and network packet buffers.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on successful configuration, or error parameter code.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_MqttClient *client, const char *topic, const void *payload, size_t len, uint8_t qos, bool retain)
memberdef.name: syn_mqtt_publish

briefdescription.para: Publish a message to a topic.

detaileddescription.para: Non-blocking publish command. For QoS 0, queued directly. For QoS 1, tracks acknowledgement state.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on queued, or error status if payload bounds exceeded.

detaileddescription.para: Formats and queues a subscription request for transmission.

briefdescription.para: Cooperative task for driving the MQTT client.

detaileddescription.para: Yields during connection, socket polling, keep-alive pinging, and packet parsing loops. Runs within the cooperative scheduler context.
